⚙️ Settings

👋 Welcome to AuthorClaw!

Let's get you set up in 60 seconds:

  1. Click the ⚙️ Settings tab above
  2. Paste your Gemini API key (it's free!)
  3. Click Save — you're ready to write!

Get a free Gemini API key →

🔎 Quick Research

🤖 Agent Report

Loading agent status...

📰 Recent Activity

No recent activity. Create a project or start a conversation to get going!

🔑 API Key Management

Keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and stored in the vault. Values are never displayed.

Can't paste? Put your keys in text files in the VM shared folder, then click Load:

Expected files: gemini_api_key.txt, telegram_bot_token.txt, deepseek_api_key.txt, anthropic_api_key.txt, openai_api_key.txt
Or a single key.txt file will be loaded into the selected key above.

🤖 AI Providers

Loading...

🎯 Model Selection

Override the model name for each active provider. Leave blank to use the default.

Loading providers...

💰 Budget Settings

🤖 Agent Behavior

When enabled, AuthorClaw wakes up on schedule, checks for active projects, and executes steps automatically. It tracks your writing progress and sends reminders to keep you on track.

Agent OFF
Loading status...

How often AuthorClaw checks for work (default: 30)

Safety limit — how many project steps per cycle (default: 5)

AuthorClaw won't wake up during quiet hours. Set both to 0 to disable.

Enable Reminders

📡 Telegram Integration

Loading...

Create a bot with @BotFather on Telegram. Save the token in API Keys above.

Your Telegram user ID. Send /start to @userinfobot to get it.

🌐 Research Domains

Approved domains for AI research. One per line.

🔧 Author OS Tools

Loading...

🧠 Memory

AuthorClaw remembers conversations and project context across sessions. Reset memory for a clean slate.

🔄 Reset Settings

Reset budget, heartbeat, and autonomous settings back to defaults. API keys and Telegram config are not affected.

💬 Test Connection

📋 Create a Project

Tell AuthorClaw what you want to achieve. It will autonomously plan the steps, choose the right tools and prompts, and execute them.

AuthorClaw will auto-detect the project type and create a step-by-step plan.

📋 Project Templates

Or choose a pre-built project template:
